title: pothos nitens
intro: Pothos nitens, also known as the golden pothos, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Arum. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Pothos nitens include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
